design_philosophy: Authoritative, objective, and function-first. The AI acts as a strict but truthful judge of the resume against the job description. The UI exposes the grid skeleton to feel technical, analytical, and precise.

rules: Primary CTA is International Klein Blue (#002FA7).
Missing skills or urgent gaps are Signal Red (#FF3B30).

scales.h1: text-5xl sm:text-6xl+ font-black tracking-tighter uppercase leading-none

rules: Use massive weight contrast: font-black for headings, font-light or normal for body.
Line height for headings must be leading-none.
Labels and overlines must be uppercase with wide tracking.

layout_and_spacing.philosophy: Generous spacing in hero, but dense 'Control Room' grid for the dashboard results.

grid_patterns.dashboard_grid: Grid Borders: Outer container has border-black. Children have border-r border-b border-black. Use negative margins or strict flex/grid to collapse double borders.

button.style: bg-[#002FA7] text-white rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase hover:bg-black transition-colors
button.secondary: bg-transparent text-black border border-black rounded-none px-8 py-4 font-bold tracking-wide uppercase hover:bg-black hover:text-white transition-colors

input.style: bg-white border border-black rounded-none px-4 py-3 focus:ring-2 focus:ring-[#002FA7] focus:outline-none focus:border-transparent font-mono text-sm

card.style: bg-white border border-black rounded-none p-6 shadow-none

gauge_score.description: A massive typography-led score display instead of a generic circle. E.g., '78' taking up half the box, with 'MATCH' in mono text.

skill_badge.match: border border-[#002FA7] text-[#002FA7] px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase font-bold
skill_badge.missing: border border-[#FF3B30] text-[#FF3B30] px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase font-bold
skill_badge.partial: border border-black text-black px-2 py-1 text-xs uppercase font-bold

landing_view.description: Split screen layout. Top: Massive Typography 'THE RESUME. THE JOB. THE VERDICT.' Below: Two equal columns. Left is a textarea for Job Description. Right is a dashed-border dropzone for the Resume. A full-width 'ANALYZE MATCH' button spans below both.
landing_view.background_image: Use the abstract geometric image as a very faint watermark or texture inside the dropzone.

loading_view.description: A brutalist terminal-style loader. 'EXTRACTING SKILLS... MATCHING...'. Progress bar is a solid black box filling up with Klein Blue.

dashboard_view.description: The 'Control Room' grid. Dense, data-heavy, 1px borders everywhere. Sections: Candidate Profile (top row), Score (massive box), Skill Match Breakdown (list of JD requirements vs Resume facts), and Personalized Learning Plan (Actionable resources and time estimates).
dashboard_view.layout: Use a complex CSS grid (e.g. 12 columns) where Score spans 4 cols, Profile spans 8 cols. Next row: Skills span 6 cols, Learning plan spans 6 cols.

images.description: Abstract Swiss style geometric pattern, intersecting precise lines and grids, minimalist. Use at 10-20% opacity inside the dropzone or as a page background texture.
A professional headshot to simulate the uploaded resume's extracted candidate profile.

motion_and_interactions.hover: Instant color inversion (white to black, black to white) for buttons. No soft fades.
motion_and_interactions.page_transition: Stark, abrupt slide-up or instant swap. Brutalist design avoids slow eases.
motion_and_interactions.loader: Staggered text reveal, like a terminal printing lines.

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure all text meets APCA standards. Black on white is maximum contrast. Klein blue on white passes easily.
accessibility_and_testing.data_testid: Apply `data-testid` to all form inputs, buttons, and major dashboard sections.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build the application as a single-page flow: Landing -> Processing -> Dashboard.
Use standard HTML inputs/divs rather than Shadcn 'Cards' to achieve the raw, border-collapse 'Grid Borders' look.
Install `Chivo` font via Google Fonts in index.html or import in CSS.
Do NOT use soft shadows, rounded corners, or gradients. Keep it flat, harsh, and technical.
In the Learning Plan, show concrete examples of 'Adjacent Skills' (e.g., JD wants React Native, Resume has React -> Adjacent Skill: React Native, Resource: 'React Native Docs', Time: '20 hours').
